talent_affixes.notes: flags=[449,0,0]=0x000001C1. OR of HealingWave(331) bit6(64)|LesserHW(8004) bit7(128)|ChainHeal(1064) bit8(256)|LightningBolt(403) bit0(1). talent_affixes.name: Healing Grace
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[448,0,0]=0x000001C0. OR of HealingWave(331) bit6(64)|LesserHW(8004) bit7(128)|ChainHeal(1064) bit8(256). No shared bits. Same combined healing flags as id=601. NOTE: talent also reduces spell resist chance by 1/2/3% — RESIST_MISS_CHANCE part not modeled separately.

talent_affixes._todo: Focused Mind (3r, tier 2) — Reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting Fire, Frost, and Nature spells. Passive pushback reduction, not implementable as SpellMod.

Nature's Guidance (3r, tier 3) — Increases chance to hit with melee, ranged, and spell attacks by 1/2/3%. Passive hit chance, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes._todo: Earth Shield (1r, tier 7) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

Healing Way (3r, tier 7) — Increases the effectiveness of your Healing Wave spell on its target by 8/16/25%. Non-linear progression (8/16/25 = not equal increments) — not modelable with linear value_per_rank.
Mana Tide Totem (1r, tier 8) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

Improved Water Shield (3r, tier 8) — Increases the chance for Water Shield charges to be released by 10/20/30% when you heal and the amount of mana gained. Proc rate modifier, not implementable as SpellMod.
Riptide (1r, tier 9) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Tidal Waves (5r, tier 9) — Casting Chain Heal or Riptide reduces cast time of next HW by 20/40/60/80/100% or increases crit of next LHW. Conditional proc mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.
Blessing of the Eternals (2r, tier 10) — Increases spell power by 2/4% of Intellect. Stat conversion, not implementable as SpellMod.
